package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for handler_tests_use_real_database_without_seam: Handler tests that hit real DB setup even though repository or service seams exist.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule074NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule074NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule074NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario074Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule074NegativeService, input Rule074NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
